non_trigger_conditions: invalid pid text returns false from process_is_alive
dead numeric pid returns false from process_is_alive
stale lock file is unlinked and acquisition loop retries instead of raising LOCK_HELD

post_packet_absent_lock_explanation.supported_interpretation: another process held the lock at packet time and released it before follow-up observation
code_evidence: serialized_lock raises LOCK_HELD before any unlink when holder pid is alive
serialized_lock unlinks only stale lock files or lock files it created and later releases
